{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/105662081?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/threalwinky/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/threalwinky/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/threalwinky/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/threalwinky/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/threalwinky", "id": 105662081, "login": "threalwinky", "node_id": "U_kgDOBkxGgQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/threalwinky/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/threalwinky/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/threalwinky/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/threalwinky/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/threalwinky/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/threalwinky", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44974", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:H/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-436", "name": "Interpretation Conflict"}], "description": "### Impact
The two parsers resolved duplicates inconsistently and silently:
- `Content.disposition()` retained the last occurrence of each parameter.
- `Content.type()` retained the first occurrence of charset and boundary.

Either behavior creates a parameter-smuggling primitive when another component in the request-processing chain (a WAF, reverse proxy, security filter, or alternate parser) resolves duplicates the opposite way. The primary attack vector is upload filename allowlist bypass:

`Content-Disposition: form-data; name="file"; filename="safe.txt"; filename="shell.php"`

### Patches
The issue has been patched in 6.0.2.

### Workarounds
Pre or post validate headers looking for duplicates.

### Resources
- [RFC 6266 §4.1 — Content-Disposition syntax](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc6266#section-4.1)
- [RFC 7231 §3.1.1.1 — Content-Type syntax](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc7231#section-3.1.1.1)
- [RFC 7230 §3.2.6 — token character set](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc7230#section-3.2.6)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00344, "percentile": 0.266}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-36hh-x5p5-jgc8", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-27T00:37:20Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-36hh-x5p5-jgc8", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-36hh-x5p5-jgc8"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44974"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-27T00:37:20Z", "references": ["https://github.com/hapijs/content/security/advisories/GHSA-36hh-x5p5-jgc8", "https://github.com/hapijs/content/commit/3850079550c191d25e3643dc82a6d61144db8c2f", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-36hh-x5p5-jgc8"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/hapijs/content/security-advisories/GHSA-36hh-x5p5-jgc8", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/hapijs/content", "summary": "@hapi/content header parser has a parameter smuggling issue that allows upload-filter bypass via duplicate parameters", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-27T00:37:20Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-36hh-x5p5-jgc8", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.0.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@hapi/content"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.0.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: @hapi/content header parser has a parameter smuggling issue that allows upload-filter bypass via duplicate parameters
